summary: Completed testing of DeezLink crystality design refonte. All pages load correctly with the new violet/black design. Backend APIs working. Navigation functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Design refonte successfully implemented with crystality.win style
All data-testid attributes present for testing
Deezer trending API integration working - album mosaic displays real data
test_credentials: No auth testing required for this refonte validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Crystality design refonte validated. All pages (Landing, Offers, Gift Cards, Login) load correctly with new violet/black theme. Backend public APIs (/api/stats/public, /api/deezer/trending) working. Navigation between pages functional. No console errors. The nav-giftcards testid is actually 'nav-gift-cards' (with hyphen).

landing_page.hero_section: PASS - Title 'deezlink', 2 pills, 2 CTA buttons, album mosaic
landing_page.footer_cta: PASS - 'Ready to listen without limits?' visible

offers_page.pack_cards: PASS - 4 packs with violet 'Buy now' buttons

login_page.magic_link_form: PASS - Email input and submit button

navigation.header_nav: PASS - Home, Pricing, Gift Cards links work

backend_apis./api/stats/public: PASS - Returns orders and links counts
backend_apis./api/deezer/trending: PASS - Returns tracks, artists, albums from Deezer

design_validation.typography: Bricolage Grotesque for headings, Manrope for body
design_validation.cards: Glass effect with violet gradient border on hover
